premise: A court translator in 1920s Istanbul discovers she has been unknowingly passing coded messages between two factions plotting to reshape the new republic. Both sides now need her silence.

characters.name: Leyla
characters.description: A polyglot translator at the foreign ministry. Precise, observant, politically naive. Speaks five languages but has never learned to lie.

characters.name: Ismet
characters.description: A senior diplomat who has been using Leyla's translations to communicate with nationalist hardliners. Charming, paternal, ruthless when cornered.

characters.name: Saoirse
characters.description: An Irish journalist in Istanbul covering the republic's growing pains. Blunt, fearless, drinks too much. The only person who believes Leyla.
